views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Today's medication schedule as a timeline, overall adherence ring, current streak badge, and quick-add FAB. Shows each time slot with taken/pending/missed status.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-log a dose with medication name (autocomplete from history), dosage amount+unit, time slot, taken toggle, optional feeling and notes.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap colored by daily adherence rate (green=100%, yellow=partial, red=missed). Tap a day to see dose-by-dose breakdown. Filter by medication name.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly/monthly adherence line chart, per-medication adherence bar chart, time-slot reliability breakdown, feeling correlation analysis, and actionable insights.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All dose entries logged today, sorted by time slot order

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayAdherenceRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of today's logged doses where taken==true (0.0–1.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTakenCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of doses marked as taken today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayMissedCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of doses marked as not taken today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAdherenceRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily adherence rate over the past 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days ending today where all logged doses were taken (100% adherence)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Best-ever consecutive 100%-adherence day streak across all history

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Difference between this week's adherence and last week's adherence (-1.0 to 1.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uniqueMedications
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Distinct medication names across all entries, sorted by frequency descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: perMedicationAdherence
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Adherence rate (taken/total) grouped by medication name for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: timeSlotReliability
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Adherence rate grouped by time slot — reveals which time of day is most/least reliable

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily adherence rate for the past 30 days for line chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: feelingDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of each feeling type across all entries for correlation analysis

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalDosesLogged
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Lifetime count of all dose entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of human-readable insight strings generated from trend analysis, missed patterns, and feeling correlations

dailyGoal.description: Target number of medication doses to take per day. Derived from the user's typical daily entry count (mode of last 14 days). Adherence ring fills based on taken/expected ratio.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if every dose entry for that day has taken==true. Days with zero entries do not break the streak (no medications scheduled). A single missed dose (taken==false) breaks the streak.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare this week's average daily adherence rate to the previous week. Calculate per-medication adherence over 30 days to flag medications with declining compliance. Identify the time slot with the lowest adherence rate as an improvement target.
insights: Time-slot vulnerability: 'You miss evening doses 3x more than morning doses — consider setting a reminder'
Medication-specific adherence: 'Your adherence for [med] dropped 20% this week vs last week'
Feeling correlation: 'You report feeling unwell more often after [med] — consider discussing with your doctor'
Weekend vs weekday pattern: 'Your adherence drops to X% on weekends vs Y% on weekdays'
Consistency score: rolling 7-day standard deviation of daily adherence — lower is better
Refill estimate: 'At your current rate, you'll need to refill [med] in approximately N days' based on dosage frequency
